pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-A-001 (LS, Ability) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4331 is insufficient to establish relevance to self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.433, ddat=0.430, dcwf=0.397) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4331 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-A-001 (composite 0.4331) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4331 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Citizen Data Scientist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.4331 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4331, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
